title: A lexical learning task for English and Italian participants
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"vmi8","text":"“Lexical learning” is the ability to set up stable and accurate mental representations of words in the lexicon  (Di Betta \u0026 Romani, 2006). The task allow to test the ability of Italian and English subjects to learn written pseudo-words in an explicit paired associate learning task, through corrective feedback. For more details see Marinelli, Zoccolotti \u0026 Romani (in revision).
